description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian in a highly abstracted and distorted form, with elongated limbs and exaggerated, angular body posture. The figure appears to be in a dynamic, crouched or crawling position, with both arms and legs bent and extended outward, creating a wide, triangular base. The surface is covered in a mix of smooth, marbled, and iridescent textures, with visible transitions between different color regions. The head is small and rounded, blending into the neck and shoulders, while the limbs taper to points that suggest hands and feet. The overall form is organic yet stylized, lacking fine anatomical detail but conveying a sense of motion and tension.
description: An abstract, elongated adult figure in a crouched or crawling pose, with angular limbs and a marbled, iridescent surface texture.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the front, showing the wide spread of the arms and legs and the small, rounded head at the center.
description_view_1: A side view highlights the bent limbs and the dynamic, forward-leaning posture of the figure.
description_view_2: From the back, the angular extension of the arms and legs is prominent, with the torso forming a central node.
description_view_3: This view focuses on one side of the figure, emphasizing the curvature and stretch of the limbs.
